title: primula officinalis subsp. macrocalyx
intro: Primula officinalis subsp. macrocalyx, also known as Greater Primrose or Greater Primula, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Primula officinalis subsp. macrocalyx include its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
